# Python Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python
```

The workflow builds every pinned Python version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `python:<version>-slim-bookworm` | `latest`, `3.14`, `3.14.6` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `python:<version>-alpine` | `latest-alpine`, `3.14-alpine`, `3.14.6-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/python:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Python images should generally use maintained CPython release lines. Deprecated here means outside the two newest pinned lines in this repository.

## Published Versions

| Version | Full image tag | Alpine image tag | Alias tags | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`3.14.6`](python/3.14.6.md) | `3.14.6` | `3.14.6-alpine` | `latest`, `latest-alpine`, `3.14`, `3.14-alpine` | Current |
| [`3.14.5`](python/3.14.5.md) | `3.14.5` | `3.14.5-alpine` | None | Superseded |
| [`3.13.7`](python/3.13.7.md) | `3.13.7` | `3.13.7-alpine` | `3.13`, `3.13-alpine` | Supported |
| [`3.12.11`](python/3.12.11.md) | `3.12.11` | `3.12.11-alpine` | `3.12`, `3.12-alpine` | Deprecated |
| [`3.11.13`](python/3.11.13.md) | `3.11.13` | `3.11.13-alpine` | `3.11`, `3.11-alpine` | Deprecated |

## Version Sources

CI refreshes this runtime from upstream git tags, then merges those discovered
versions with pinned versions in `generic/python/versions.yml`.
